elements.name: app-shell
elements.description:
The core layout component for the application.
Handles theme switching and navigation slotting.
Uses Material Design 3 tokens and components.
---


### **Slots:**
 - **app-content** - The place for the dynamic application content
- **app-nav** - Where the navigation component is placed

slots.name: app-content
slots.description: The place for the dynamic application content

slots.name: app-nav
slots.description: Where the navigation component is placed

elements.name: bento-layout
elements.description:
BentoLayout - The primary layout component implementing a responsive Bento Grid.
Consolidates profile photo, bio, configurations, contact info, skills, education,
work experience, code projects, and blog posts into individual grid cards.
---

elements.name: blog-post
elements.description:
Represents a published blog record, linking to the artifact
---


### **Methods:**
 - **blogPost()** - The {@link BlogPostJson} record to render

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--blog-post-animation** - The duration of the animation for \`:focus\`, \`:hover\`, \`:focus-within\`, and \`:focus-visible\` states _(default: undefined)_
- **--blog-post-primary-text-color** - The color of the primary text _(default: undefined)_
- **--blog-post-container-color** - The color of the container, {@link @material/web!MdElevatedCard} and {@link @material/web!--md-elevated-card-container-color} _(default: undefined)_

attributes.name: blogPost
attributes.description: The {@link BlogPostJson} record to render

elements.name: bento-card
elements.description:
BentoCard - A reusable card component for the bento grid.

A reusable card component designed for implementation within a responsive Bento Grid layout.
It handles the visual properties of the grid items, including Material Design 3 container tokens,
glassmorphism filters, and interaction states.

## Features
- **Glassmorphism**: Built-in backdrop filters and semi-transparent backgrounds.
- **Interaction**: Optional elevation and translation on hover/focus, controlled via properties.
- **Theming**: Integrated with Material Design 3 tokens for consistent color and corner radius.
- **Expansion**: Built-in collapsible behavior using `<details>` and `<summary>` with smooth height transitions.
- **Header Styling**: Automatically styles slotted `h2` or `header`-slotted elements as section headers.
- **Scrolling**: Optional `scrollable` mode for internal content overflow.
---


### **Slots:**
 - _default_ - Default slot for card content. Slotted `h2` elements receive standardized header styling.
- **header** - Content to be displayed in the card's header/summary area.

attributes.name: enableFocus
attributes.description:
Whether to enable enhanced border and shadow styling on focus-within.
Defaults to false.

attributes.name: enableHover
attributes.description:
Whether to enable the lift-on-hover effect.
Defaults to false to minimize visual motion in dense layout grids.

attributes.name: expanded
attributes.description:
Reflects and controls the open state of the underlying `<details>` element.
When true, the card is expanded and content is visible.

attributes.name: scrollable
attributes.description: Enables internal vertical scrolling for content.

slots.description: Default slot for card content. Slotted `h2` elements receive standardized header styling.

slots.name: header
slots.description: Content to be displayed in the card's header/summary area.

properties.name: enableFocus
properties.description:
Whether to enable enhanced border and shadow styling on focus-within.
Defaults to false.

properties.name: enableHover
properties.description:
Whether to enable the lift-on-hover effect.
Defaults to false to minimize visual motion in dense layout grids.

properties.name: expanded
properties.description:
Reflects and controls the open state of the underlying `<details>` element.
When true, the card is expanded and content is visible.

properties.name: scrollable
properties.description: Enables internal vertical scrolling for content.

elements.name: step-up-dialog
elements.description:
A versatile confirmation dialog used to verify user intent before performing
significant actions like resetting settings.
---


### **Events:**

### **Methods:**

### **Slots:**
 - **actions** - The area of dialog action buttons
- **content** - The body of the {@link MdDialog}
- **headline** - The {@link MdDialog} headline {@link slot}

elements.name: ui-mode-toggle
elements.description:
A standalone component for managing and toggling the UI color scheme (light, dark, system)
and persistence. This component acts as a wrapper around the `dark-mode-toggle` custom element,
integrating its functionality with the application's global `configsService` for state management
and `themeService` for dynamic theme application.
---


### **Events:**
 - **color_scheme.change** - Dispatched when the UI mode (light/dark/system) or color scheme contrast is changed, propagating the new `AppConfigs["colorScheme"]` details.
- **colorschemechange** - Event from `dark-mode-toggle` when the scheme changes.
- **permanentcolorscheme** - Event from `dark-mode-toggle` when the persistence changes.

### **Methods:**
 - **reset(): _void_** - Resets the UI mode toggle to its default settings.

attributes.name: mode
attributes.description: Reflects the currently active color scheme mode.

attributes.name: permanent
attributes.description: Controls whether the selected color scheme preference is persisted across sessions.

events.name: color_scheme.change
events.description: Dispatched when the UI mode (light/dark/system) or color scheme contrast is changed, propagating the new `AppConfigs["colorScheme"]` details.

events.name: colorschemechange
events.description: Event from `dark-mode-toggle` when the scheme changes.

events.name: permanentcolorscheme
events.description: Event from `dark-mode-toggle` when the persistence changes.

properties.name: mode
properties.description: Reflects the currently active color scheme mode.

properties.name: permanent
properties.description: Controls whether the selected color scheme preference is persisted across sessions.

events.name: permanentcolorscheme

elements.name: word-cloud
elements.description:
---


### **Methods:**
 - **appearance()** - Controls the order in which words are animated/displayed.

Can be 'sequential' (words appear one by one) or 'simultaneous' (words appear all at once).
- **grouping()** - Controls how words are grouped together within the cloud.

Supported modes: 'category', 'quartile', or 'ungrouped'.
- **sorting()** - Controls how words are sorted within their groupings.

Supported modes: 'by-weight', 'by-weight-reversed', 'by-alphabet', 'by-alphabet-reversed', or 'none'.

### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--word-cloud-animation** - Duration of the entrance animation for each word. _(default: 150ms)_
- **--word-cloud-animation-reduced** - Duration of the entrance animation when prefers-reduced-motion is active. _(default: 1ms)_
- **--word-cloud-first-quartile-font-size** - Font size for words in the first weight quartile (highest weight). _(default: 1.75rem)_
- **--word-cloud-first-quartile-line-height** - Line height for words in the first weight quartile. _(default: 1.75rem)_
- **--word-cloud-second-quartile-font-size** - Font size for words in the second weight quartile. _(default: 1.5rem)_
- **--word-cloud-second-quartile-line-height** - Line height for words in the second weight quartile. _(default: 1.5rem)_
- **--word-cloud-third-quartile-font-size** - Font size for words in the third weight quartile. _(default: 1.25rem)_
- **--word-cloud-third-quartile-line-height** - Line height for words in the third weight quartile. _(default: 1.25rem)_
- **--word-cloud-fourth-quartile-font-size** - Font size for words in the fourth weight quartile (lowest weight). _(default: 1rem)_
- **--word-cloud-fourth-quartile-line-height** - Line height for words in the fourth weight quartile. _(default: 1rem)_

attributes.name: appearance
attributes.description:
Controls the order in which words are animated/displayed.

Can be 'sequential' (words appear one by one) or 'simultaneous' (words appear all at once).

attributes.name: delay
attributes.description:
The delay in milliseconds between word appearances when using sequential mode.

Set to "none" to use the component's internal default delays.

attributes.name: grouping
attributes.description:
Controls how words are grouped together within the cloud.

Supported modes: 'category', 'quartile', or 'ungrouped'.

attributes.name: instant-clear
attributes.description:
Whether to clear the word cloud instantly when it is no longer visible.
When true, the cloud resets instantly to opacity 0 instead of fading out.

attributes.name: sorting
attributes.description:
Controls how words are sorted within their groupings.

Supported modes: 'by-weight', 'by-weight-reversed', 'by-alphabet', 'by-alphabet-reversed', or 'none'.

attributes.name: threshold
attributes.description:
The intersection observer threshold for visibility detection.

A value between 0 and 1 indicating what percentage of the element must be visible to trigger animation.

attributes.name: words
attributes.description: The list of words to display in the cloud.

properties.name: delay
properties.description:
The delay in milliseconds between word appearances when using sequential mode.

Set to "none" to use the component's internal default delays.

properties.name: instantClear
properties.description:
Whether to clear the word cloud instantly when it is no longer visible.
When true, the cloud resets instantly to opacity 0 instead of fading out.

properties.name: threshold
properties.description:
The intersection observer threshold for visibility detection.

A value between 0 and 1 indicating what percentage of the element must be visible to trigger animation.

properties.name: words
properties.description: The list of words to display in the cloud.

elements.name: word-tag
elements.description:
Displays a word in a simple padded box in which the text color and border are synchronised
---


### **CSS Properties:**
 - **--word-tag-color** - The text and border color _(default: --md-sys-color-on-primary-container)_
- **--word-tag-background-color** - The background color _(default: --md-sys-color-primary-container)_
- **--word-tag-font-family** - The font family _(default: --md-ref-typeface-brand)_
- **--word-tag-font-size** - The font size _(default: --md-typescale-body-large-font-size)_
- **--word-tag-font-weight** - The font weight _(default: --md-ref-typeface-weight-regular)_
- **--word-tag-line-height** - The line height _(default: --md-typescale-body-large-lingt-height)_
- **--word-tag-border-radius** - The corner radius (for all corners) _(default: --md-sys-shape-corner-small)_

attributes.name: heaviness
attributes.description: The weight of the tag (text & border), can be `"normal"` (`--md-ref-typeface-weight-regular` & `--hairline-width`) or `"heavy"` (`--md-ref-typeface-weight-bold` & `2.5 * --hairline-width`)

attributes.name: hrefUrl
attributes.description: A URL which, when provided, wraps this {@link WordTag} in a {@link HTMLAnchorElement}

attributes.name: word
attributes.description: The tagged word

properties.name: heaviness
properties.description: The weight of the tag (text & border), can be `"normal"` (`--md-ref-typeface-weight-regular` & `--hairline-width`) or `"heavy"` (`--md-ref-typeface-weight-bold` & `2.5 * --hairline-width`)

properties.name: hrefUrl
properties.description: A URL which, when provided, wraps this {@link WordTag} in a {@link HTMLAnchorElement}

properties.name: word
properties.description: The tagged word
